item.name: Princess Salmon
item.description:
Not deigning to leave her domain, the princess salmon always remains in the waters of the One River.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Unlike most other salmon species, the princess does not migrate out to sea, and lives out its entire life in familiar freshwater. Its succulent flesh was the favorite of a popular Doman princess generations past, which led to it being given its name.
